tabs.label: Home
tabs.title: Support the school, strengthen the alumni network, and help shape North America Connect 2026.
tabs.copy: This site brings together the most important ways to stay involved: give from the United States, support or attend North America Connect 2026, and reach the team directly.

tabs.label: Causes
tabs.title: Causes We Support
tabs.copy: The Josephite Alumni Association of North America (JAANA), in partnership with The Old Boys' Association (OBA) of St. Joseph's Boys' High School, remains steadfast in its commitment to supporting students, teachers, and the School through structured, transparent, and high-impact initiatives.

tabs.label: Donate
tabs.title: Donate to JAANA
tabs.copy: Support JAANA, SJBHS-OBA, and BJES through the donation routes on this page.

tabs.label: North America Connect 2026
tabs.title: North America Connect 2026
tabs.copy:
Dust off your school spirit and get ready for a weekend of pure nostalgia. Join us this September 19th and 20th for a spectacular gathering of Josephites from across North America. From a high-energy gala night to a classic school-style picnic, we are bringing the best of St Joseph's to Northern Virginia.

Even better? Every ticket helps us give back. Proceeds from the event will support the SJBHS OBA Teachers Insurance Program, ensuring we take care of the mentors who shaped us.

tabs.label: Contact Us
tabs.title: Contact JAANA
tabs.copy: Use this page for donation questions, sponsorship inquiries, alumni coordination, and general outreach.

impactStats.label: Zeffy donation form opens in a pop-up
North America Connect weekend near Washington, D.C.

priorityCards.title: Causes
priorityCards.body: Review the school causes currently open for support, compare their scope, and choose the impact area that matters most to you.

priorityCards.title: Donate
priorityCards.body: Open the Donate page to use the embedded Zeffy form and review current contact details for donors.

priorityCards.title: North America Connect 2026
priorityCards.body: North America Connect 2026 brings Josephites across North America to Northern Virginia for a Saturday gala night and Sunday picnic weekend.
points: Tickets and sponsorship both support the SJBHS OBA Teachers Insurance Program

causeCards.title: Student Scholarships
causeCards.summary: Enable students requiring financial aid to pursue their education goals at SJBHS.
causeCards.purpose: Enable students requiring financial aid to pursue their education goals at SJBHS with dignity, stability, and continuity.
support: Grant: $800 supports one student for one school year.
Endowment: $16,000 supports a student on a recurring basis.
donationWays: Make a one-time grant to support students immediately.
Create longer-term recurring impact through an endowment commitment.
Direct a gift to scholarships through the standard donation route.

causeCards.title: Teachers Insurance Program
causeCards.summary: Protect teaching staff, support staff, retired staff, and eligible families through insurance coverage.
causeCards.purpose: Provide teaching staff, support staff, retired staff, and their families with comprehensive health and personal accident insurance cover.
causeCards.impact: Impact: health insurance coverage for 540 staff and family members, plus personal accident insurance coverage for 180 teaching staff.
support: Grant: $200 supports one staff member, spouse, and dependents for one year.
donationWays: Fund the current insurance cycle through a one-time grant.
Build recurring support through an endowment contribution.
Direct a gift to teacher welfare through the standard donation process.

causeCards.title: Mid-Day Meal Program
causeCards.summary: Provide students requiring financial aid with nourishing meals at school.
causeCards.purpose: Provide students requiring financial aid with nourishing meals at school so they can learn and grow well.
support: Grant: $150 provides meals to one student for one year.
donationWays: Make a one-time grant to fund meals now.
Use an endowment route to create recurring annual support.
Direct a gift to the meal program through the standard donation route.

causeCards.title: Student Awards Program
causeCards.summary: Recognize and reward students excelling in academics, sports, and the arts.
causeCards.purpose: Recognize and reward students excelling in academics, sports, and the arts.
causeCards.goal: Goal: an awards system that drives excellence.
causeCards.impact: Impact: students receive awards in strategic classes and levels, boosting morale and confidence at the right time.
support: Awards typically range between $300 and $500 per award annually.
Endowment funds can be set up for recurring support.
Named donor-backed prizes work especially well for this program.
donationWays: Endowment support is the primary route for recurring annual awards.
This cause suits donors who want visible, long-term recognition tied to student excellence.

causeCards.title: School Infrastructure Development
causeCards.summary: Support classrooms, laboratories, sports facilities, and other campus development needs.
causeCards.purpose: Support development of school infrastructure such as classrooms, a sports complex, laboratories, and other campus needs.
causeCards.impact: Impact: legacy-led contributions can fund named learning spaces and long-term improvements across the school campus.
support: Name a classroom: $30,000, payable over 3 years.
Plaque on a pillar or pavilion: $6,000.
donationWays: Make a one-time grant for immediate capital support.
Use named giving opportunities for classrooms, pillars, and pavilions.
General contributions can still be directed toward broader infrastructure needs.

causeCards.title: Other Jesuit causes
causeCards.summary: Support other BJES education causes, including St. Joseph's Panditahalli and allied schools.
causeCards.purpose: Support other BJES causes in the field of education, including initiatives for St. Joseph's Panditahalli and other allied schools.
causeCards.goal: Goal: donor-directed support for allied Jesuit education causes.
causeCards.impact: Impact: donors can extend support beyond the core OBA priorities to allied schools and education initiatives.
support: Directed gifts can support St. Joseph's Panditahalli and allied schools.
Use the donation agreement to specify the intended end use clearly.
Suitable for individual, family, or batch-led contributions supporting allied Jesuit work.
donationWays: Use the donation agreement to state the exact Jesuit or BJES cause you want supported.
One-time grants work well for directed needs requiring current deployment.
Endowment and general donation routes can still be used when a recurring or pooled structure is more appropriate.

donationRoutes.title: Endowment
donationRoutes.body: An invested corpus created with JAANA US. At least 5% is distributed yearly to the donor's chosen cause.

donationRoutes.title: Grant
donationRoutes.body: A grant of $1,000 or more to a donor-selected JAANA/OBA cause.

donationRoutes.title: Small gifts
donationRoutes.body: Donations of less than $1,000 are used by JAANA and the SJBHS OBA where needed most.

donationRoutes.title: Employer Matching
donationRoutes.body: Check whether your employer can match your donation.

sponsorHighlights.title: Save the date
sponsorHighlights.body: North America Connect is planned for September 19 and 20, 2026 in the Washington, D.C. metro area, with a Saturday Dinner and Sunday Picnic Lunch.

sponsorHighlights.title: Audience and reach
sponsorHighlights.body: The sponsor packet projects 100+ in-person attendees across alumni and families, plus 300+ additional members reached through JAANA social channels.

sponsorHighlights.title: Charitable impact
sponsorHighlights.body: Event proceeds are intended to support the SJBHS OBA Teachers Insurance fund covering teaching staff, support staff, retired staff, and eligible families.

sponsorHighlights.title: Why sponsors fit here
sponsorHighlights.body: Sponsors are speaking to a high-trust alumni audience that values relationships, referrals, and services across real estate, finance, tax, wealth planning, senior care, insurance, banking, and legal work.

sponsorTiers.title: Bronze
benefits: Text listing in the brochure and digital brochure.
Rolling presentation listing at the venue.
Tagged in thank-you and recap communications.

sponsorTiers.title: Silver
benefits: Half-page ad in the brochure and digital brochure.
Logo in the rolling presentation plus banner placement.
Individual social post and 1 included ticket.

sponsorTiers.title: Gold
benefits: Full-page brochure ad, QR option, and hyperlinks in the digital brochure.
Feature-story or video treatment on social media.
Individual table or sponsor-zone visibility, podium recognition, and 2 included tickets.

sponsorMaterials.alt: First page of the North America Connect 2026 call for sponsors packet.
sponsorMaterials.caption: Call for Sponsors: overview page

sponsorMaterials.alt: Second page of the North America Connect 2026 call for sponsors packet detailing sponsor tiers.
sponsorMaterials.caption: Call for Sponsors: sponsorship tiers

connectPage.sponsorMessage: We are seeking sponsors for our North America Connect reunion. Your brand or business will have the opportunity to reach hundreds of successful Josephites and their families. Proceeds from the event will fund the OBA Teachers Insurance Program. Individual and batch benefactors are also warmly welcome.
complimentaryTickets: Full Time University Students (SJBHS Alumni): Free (Registration Required)

travel.discountLabel: Promo Code: ZSJE201804 (valid for travel to/from IAD between 9/18-9/21)

stay.contact: Book through the Hyatt group link.
stay.courtesyBlock: Hotel room block available on a first come basis through Aug 21 2026.
stay.shuttle: Complimentary shuttle to and from IAD.

merchandise.body: Merchandise details will be available soon.
merchandise.preorder: Visit here after Aug 1st to pre-order your merchandise before the event and pick up during the reunion. Limited supplies.

sponsorDetails: Corporate Sponsorship: Perfect for promoting your brand/business to hundreds of Josephites.
Individual Sponsorship: A great way to contribute in your personal capacity.
Batch Sponsorship: Team up with classmates to sponsor as a group, such as The Class of '08.
Additional advertising add-ons are available for DJ/Music sponsors, Swag Bag Sponsor, Cocktail Bar sponsor, Photobooth sponsor, and more.
Whether you choose to advertise a business or simply give back to our teachers, your support makes a massive difference.

placeholders.title: Pricing
placeholders.body: Early Bird Pricing (through June 15th 2026): Full Event $80; Dinner Only $60; Picnic Only $30. Regular Pricing (June 15th - Aug 31st 2026): Full Event $100; Dinner Only $70; Picnic Only $40. Full Time University Students (SJBHS Alumni) and kids 12 and under are free with registration.

placeholders.title: Schedule
placeholders.body: Cocktails, Dinner and Dancing: Saturday, September 19th 2026, 6:30pm - 2am at All Go Rhythms Bar & Restaurant. Picnic Lunch and Games: Sunday, September 20th 2026, 11am - 4pm at Lake Fairfax Park, Canopy G.

placeholders.title: Travel and Stay
placeholders.body: Recommended airport: IAD. United promo code ZSJE201804 is applicable for travel to/from IAD between 9/18-9/21. The hotel room block is at Hyatt Regency Dulles with group code G-SJ18 and is available on a first come basis through Aug 21 2026.

placeholders.title: Josephite Merchandise
placeholders.body: Josephite merchandise details will be available soon. Pre-orders open after Aug 1st, with event pickup during the reunion.

placeholders.title: Local Attractions
placeholders.body: Local attraction previews link to official visitor guides and local planning sources for monuments, Smithsonian museums, Old Town Alexandria, Georgetown, National Harbor, restaurants, wineries, breweries, historic sites, trails, nature centers, and nightlife.

secondaryPages.title: About Us
secondaryPages.body: A concise introduction to JAANA, the school, and the wider mission can expand here over time.

secondaryPages.title: Gallery and previous reunions
secondaryPages.body: Past reunions and photo archives can continue to support the story of the community without competing with current priorities.

secondaryPages.title: Mentor, Volunteer, Statements, and External Sites
secondaryPages.body: These areas can be developed next as the giving experience and North America Connect 2026 campaign continue to mature.

homeCopy.heroLead: JAANA supports St. Joseph's Boys' High School through alumni-led service, giving, and community events across North America.
homeCopy.aboutBody: The Josephite Alumni Association of North America brings together SJBHS alumni and families to support scholarships, teacher welfare, student programmes, and school development through trusted giving and active fellowship.
homeCopy.causesCardBody: Review the active school causes and decide where you want your support to go.
homeCopy.donateCardBody: Open the Zeffy donation form or use the contact points below if you need help with a gift.
homeCopy.connectCardBody: Register, sponsor, or review the full September 2026 reunion weekend details.

homeCopy.upcomingEventsBody: North America Connect 2026 | September 19-20, 2026 | Northern Virginia and the Washington, D.C. metro area.
